---
title: "Untitled"
---

add study airport max capacity for 2025, ideally bokend down into max ARR and max DEP.


HOMEWORK BENE
todo - update max capacity for 2025

```{r}
bra_cap <- tribble(   
  # CHECK AND VERIFY BRA DATA! # Hugo: Manually updated all airport values referring to DECEA 2021 Report
  ~APT_ICAO, ~YEAR, ~MAX_CAP
  , "SBCT" , 2025 , 24
  , "SBCT" , 2025 , 28
  , "SBCT" , 2025 , 32
  , "SBCT" , 2025 , 32
)
```
